## Checklist (for new problems)

<!-- If requesting a new problem, complete this section -->

- [ ] Problem is on LeetCode (link: )
- [ ] Problem is not already in the repository
- [ ] Problem covers a distinct pattern or technique not well-represented
- [ ] I am willing to implement this if approved
